content:
<@&1440133908661534790> 

Hey Everyone,

A friendly reminder that the **Origin of Time** item you may have in your inventory or mailbox are time-limited and will expire soon!

If you don't use them, you will lose them permanently. The exact expiration date and time should be listed on the item itself in your inventory.

**What to do:**

Check your in-game inventory for the Origin of Time item.

Decide which standard banner Awakener you want to "rewind" to get their investment materials (dupes, experience) back.

Use the item on that character **BEFORE** the timer runs out!

Don't miss out on reallocating those valuable resources! Plan wisely and good luck!

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

大家好！ 

友情提醒：您背包或邮箱中的“时间起源”道具是有时间限制的，即将过期！ 

如果您不使用，将会永久丢失。道具本身会显示具体的过期日期和时间。 

**操作方法：** 

查看游戏内背包，找到“时间起源”道具。 

选择您想要“回溯”的普通卡池觉醒者，以返还其投入的资源（重复角色、经验值）。 

在倒计时结束前**务必**对该角色使用道具！ 

不要错过重新分配这些宝贵资源的机会！请谨慎规划，祝您好运！
